title: Interpretation of the Implementation Practice of Real Estate Registration and Concealment: Four Scenes and Legal Paths to Pierce the Veil
lead: Real estate registered in the name of others is definitely not a" debt avoidance safe "!Creditors only need to grasp the three cores of the source of capital contribution, actual control and debt time line, and cooperate with the flexible use of legal tools, they can negate the effect of registration facade through legal procedures, so that hidden property has no hiding place..

blocks.text: Introduction

In the civil execution procedure, some persons subjected to execution, in order to evade their debts, register the purchase of real estate actually funded by themselves in the name of their spouses, children or even other third parties, resulting in" no property available for execution "when the court executes it - a common phenomenon.However, the real estate registration is not equal to the real ownership!This article, based on the Civil Code and judicial interpretations and supported by judicial precedents, dismantles the four scenarios of "concealing property by name" and the ways to solve them, so as to provide creditors with a penetrating execution plan.
Four Hidden Scenes and Cracking Paths
Scenario 1: Real Estate Registered in Spouse's Name – Subdivision of Common Property by Subrogation&Cancellation of Improper Punishment

Can the property registered in the name of the spouse be directly executed if the person subjected to execution divides his or her real estate or the real estate belonging to the common property of the husband and wife by means of divorce agreement?

If the property is registered in the name of the spouse, but there is direct evidence to prove that it is the joint property of the husband and wife, according to Article 12 of the Provisions of the Supreme People's Court on Sealing up, Seizure and Freezing Property in Civil Execution by the People's Court, the court may directly seal up the jointly owned property and notify the co-owners in a timely manner. The co-owners may agree to divide the property or bring a lawsuit against the co-owners for property division. If the co-owners are lazy in dividing the property and cause damage to the rights and interests of the creditors, the creditors may directly bring a lawsuit against the creditors for property division on their behalf.

If the spouse claims personal property, the creditor may bring a lawsuit of property division by subrogation to confirm the debtor's share of property.If the person subjected to execution transfers his property free of charge through a divorce agreement, the creditor may bring an action for cancellation right

blocks.content: In case No. 959 [2024] of Yun01 Civil Division, the court held that after the debt was incurred, the debtor's gratuitous disposal of the house involved in the case through the divorce agreement had affected the realization of the creditor's rights, and the agreement seriously weakened the debtor's ability to pay off, so the court supported the claim to revoke the case involving the second paragraph of Article 5" Property Division "of the Divorce Agreement.

blocks.text: Scene 2: Real Estate Registered in the Name of a Third Person – Revocation Action

If the person subjected to execution has a high solvency at the time of signing the contract for debts, the creditor decides to trade with the person subjected to execution only on the basis of the better goodwill of the person subjected to execution. However, after the creditor's rights and debts are incurred, if the person subjected to execution donates property or transfers it to others at an unreasonable low price, his solvency will be reduced, and the gratuitous donation will damage the interests of the creditor. Therefore, the creditor may bring a lawsuit to revoke the donation or transfer.

blocks.content: In the case of (2021) Yu 05 Min Zhong No.888, the debtor transferred the house in dispute to a third party at an obviously unreasonable low price after the debt occurred, thus harming the realization of the interests of the creditor, so the court supported the creditor's claim to revoke the House Sale Agreement signed by the defendant and the third party, and confirmed that the real estate involved in the case was owned by the debtor.

blocks.text: [TRANSLATION NEEDED] 但是相反，如果被执行人签约之前，早已经将财产赠与他人，由于在签订负债合同之时，债权人考察了对方（即被执行人）的商誉情况后，仍然决定发生商务往来，这属于债权人未尽审慎注意义务，应自行承担交易风险，不得撤销被执行人的赠与行为。
Scene 3: Real estate registered in the name of minor children - confirmation action is recognized as family common property
First of all, generally speaking, minor children have no income and the purchase money generally comes from their parents.

The People's Court of Yunyang County considers that according to Article 595 of the Civil Code," a sales contract is a contract whereby the seller transfers the ownership of the subject matter to the buyer and the buyer pays the price ". According to the purchase contract and relevant payment receipts and other evidence, if the price of the purchase subject matter is actually paid, it shall be the actual buyer of the sales contract.

If the purchase price is paid by the child, examine whether the child has the actual purchasing power.If a minor child has no independent source of income and basically has no purchasing power, the nature of the property under the minor child's name should be emphasized.As a member of the family, the property under the name of a minor child, regardless of whether it comes from either party of the husband and wife, generally belongs to the common property of the family.However, it does not rule out that some minor children do enjoy personal property. From the perspective of protecting the legitimate rights and interests of creditors and safeguarding the safety of transactions, such property should undoubtedly be recognized as owned by minor children, and the court shall not list such property as the scope of execution when handling enforcement cases, nor shall it take compulsory measures such as freezing and sealing up.

Secondly, although the house is registered under the name of the minor child, most of the houses are shared by family members for a long time, and the real estate managed by the parents shall be regarded as the common property of the family.

blocks.caseId: No. 3288 [2022] of the Early Republic of China of Xiang 0725
blocks.content: In the case No. 3288 [2022] of the early Republic of China of Xiang 0725, the court took the existing use status of the house as one of the bases for judging the actual ownership of the house.

blocks.text: The time of final real estate registration and the time before and after the formation of the debt is an important factor in examining whether the debtor is malicious, and also an important basis for the creditor to exercise the right of revocation.

If the real estate is registered after the debt, according to the provisions of Article 154 of the Civil Code:" A civil juristic act of malicious collusion between the actor and the counterpart that damages the legitimate rights and interests of others is invalid. "Malicious transfer may be directly presumed;The applicant for execution may revoke the gift through the creditor's action for revocation to make the above-mentioned house return to the owner of the executed person, and then execute the above-mentioned house.

blocks.caseId: No. 3288 [2022] of the Early Republic of China of Xiang 0725
blocks.content: If the real estate is registered before the debt occurs, the Civil Ruling No. (2020) of the Supreme People's Court holds that the house registered in the name of the minor child purchased by the person subjected to execution is the common property of the family, and the shares owned by the person subjected to execution may be executed.The People's Court of Taoyuan County, Hunan Province, in Case No. 3288 [2022] of the early Republic of China, held that there was no sufficient evidence to prove that the debtor's husband and wife really meant to donate the house to their minor daughter when purchasing the house;In addition, if his minor daughter has not provided evidence to prove that he has invested or contributed to the house involved in the case, the court shall determine that the house is the joint property of the debtor's husband and wife from the perspective of balancing the interests of both creditors and debtors in light of the actual investment, existing use status and social status of the house involved in the case.

blocks.text: Scene 4: Real estate is registered in the name of an adult child - the action for confirmation is recognized as the common property of the family

Adult children need to prove their ability to purchase houses by themselves, otherwise they may still be recognized as holding on their behalf!Whether the purchase money comes from the debtor is an important basis for judging the actual ownership of the house. For adult children, we should focus on examining whether their wage income level is positively related to the property involved, such as large transfer and property status before the formation of debts.

(2020) In the Supreme People's Court Case No. 5648, the Supreme People's Court held that the children of the person subjected to execution did not have the corresponding ability to pay the purchase price when purchasing the house, and the money involved in the case was paid by the person subjected to execution.However, when the children of the person subjected to execution purchased the house involved in the case, the creditor's rights and debts between the creditor and the person subjected to execution did not occur, and it cannot be proved that the purchase of a house for the children of the person subjected to execution was a malicious evasion of debts.The house involved in the case is purchased by the debtor's husband and wife, and his adult daughter has no financial ability to purchase a house with a value of nearly one million yuan when purchasing the house. The actual investor of the house involved in the case is not the right registrant. Therefore, the court determines that the house involved in the case is the common property of the debtor's husband and wife and their adult daughter's family, and the shares owned by the person subjected to execution may be executed.
Lawyers' Case Handling Tool Box: Guidelines for the Whole Process of Enforcement Procedures
Property clues mining and evidence chain construction

Application for investigation order: obtain the bank flow, house purchase contract, real estate registration information and property records of the debtor and related parties;Find out the certificate of capital contribution for the purchase price and the certificate of actual possession and use.
Through the flow of funds: According to the debtor's property report, focus on the verification of abnormal transfers before and after the formation of debts.
Litigation Strategy Selection
Revocation right action: against gratuitous transfer or malicious transfer

blocks.caseId: (2023) No. 2731 [2023] of the early Republic of China
blocks.content: In Case No. 2731 [2023] of the Early Republic of China, the debtor attempted to dispose of the house involved in the case free of charge by signing the Divorce Agreement, which seriously damaged the legitimate rights and interests of the creditor, and the court supported the creditor's claim to revoke the debtor's agreement through the divorce agreement.

blocks.text: Subrogation of property division litigation: against the common property of husband, wife and family, and the debtor is negligent in dividing the property

blocks.caseId: (2024) No. 5035 [2024] of Shaanxi 0111 Early Republic of China
blocks.content: In the (2024) Shaan 0111 Early Republic of China Case No. 5035 and (2025) Yun 01 Civil End Case No. 518, the relevant creditor's rights are in the compulsory execution of the court, and the debtor has no other property available for execution except for the property shared with an outsider. The court has sealed up, seized or frozen the common property and notified the co-owners. The person subjected to execution and other co-owners neither agree to divide the common property nor bring a lawsuit for property division, which hinders the compulsory execution of the court and the realization of the creditor's rights of the applicant for execution. The court supports the creditor's claim for property division, and safeguards the legitimate rights and interests of the creditor.

blocks.text: Use the" crime of refusing to execute "flexibly to exert pressure: those whose malicious transfer is serious shall be investigated for criminal responsibility

blocks.caseId: (2025) New 40 No. 9 at the end of the sentence
blocks.content: [TRANSLATION NEEDED] （2025）新40刑终9号案中，法院认为，被告人陈某甲为了逃避责任，在收到法院追加其为被执行人通知后，明知其房产有银行贷款未还清，财产不足以向申请执行人杨某乙清偿债务，仍出售房产，并要求购买人将出售款以现金方式支付给其儿子，转移、隐匿财产逃避法院执行的主观故意明显，致使人民法院生效的裁定无法执行，属于情节严重，已构成拒不执行判决、裁定罪，应依法惩处。

blocks.text: Implementation of interface measures

In accordance with the provisions of the first and second paragraphs of Article 13 of the Provisions of the Supreme People's Court on Sealing up, Seizure and Freezing Property in Civil Execution by People's Courts, the real estate under the name of a third party shall be applied for sealing up synchronously to prevent sale;To apply for execution directly with an effective judgment to avoid idling of the procedure.

conclusion:
Real estate registered in the name of others is definitely not a" safe for avoiding debts "!Creditors only need to grasp the three cores of the source of capital contribution, actual control and debt time line, and cooperate with the flexible use of legal tools, they can negate the validity of registration facade through legal procedures, so that hidden property has nothing to hide!
 (All parties to the case in the text are pseudonyms, please contact a professional enforcement lawyer if you need case consultation)  n-We have been focusing on the field of enforcement for 10 years, and we have made the judgment sound -  nReference:  n Civil Code of the People's Republic of China  n Article 154 Civil juristic acts in which the actor and the counterpart collude maliciously and damage the legitimate rights and interests of others are invalid.
 Article 303 Where the co-owners agree not to divide a commonly owned realty or chattel in order to maintain the relationship of co-ownership, the agreement shall be followed, provided that if the co-owners have major reasons to divide the realty or chattel, they may request the division;If there is no agreement or the agreement is not clear, the co-owners by shares may request the division at any time, and the co-owners may request the division when the common basis is lost or there are major reasons for the division.If the division causes damage to other co-owners, compensation shall be made.
 Article 538 Where a debtor disposes of its property rights and interests free of charge by waiving its creditor's rights, waiving the guarantee of its creditor's rights, or transferring its property free of charge, or maliciously extends the time limit for the performance of its due creditor's rights, thus affecting the realization of the creditor's rights, the creditor may request the people's court to revoke the debtor's act.
 Article 541 The obligee's cancellation right shall be exercised within one year from the date on which the obligee knows or should know the cause for cancellation.If the debtor fails to exercise the right of cancellation within five years from the date of occurrence of the debtor's act, the right of cancellation shall be extinguished.
 Criminal Law of the People's Republic of China  n Article 313 [Crime of Refusing to Execute Judgments or Orders] Whoever refuses to execute a judgment or order of a people's court when he has the ability to do so, if the circumstances are serious, shall be sentenced to fixed-term imprisonment of not more than three years, criminal detention or a fine;If the circumstances are especially serious, he shall be sentenced to fixed-term imprisonment of not less than three years but not more than seven years and shall also be fined.
 Provisions of the Supreme People's Court on Sealing up, Seizure and Freezing of Property in Civil Execution by People's Courts  n Article 12 The people's court may seal up, seize or freeze the property jointly owned by the person subjected to execution and other persons, and notify the co-owners in a timely manner.
 If the co-owners divide the common property by agreement and are approved by the creditors, the people's court may determine it to be valid.The effect of sealing up, distraining or freezing shall extend to the property within the share enjoyed by the person subjected to execution after the division of the agreement;The people's court shall rule to terminate the seizure, seizure or freezing of the property within the share enjoyed by other co-owners.
 If a co-owner brings a lawsuit for division of property or an applicant for execution brings a lawsuit for division of property by subrogation, the people's court shall grant permission.Execution of the property shall be suspended during the proceedings.
 Article 13 The people's court may seal up, distrain or freeze the property of the person subjected to execution possessed by a third party for the interests of the person subjected to execution;If the property is assigned to a third party for continued custody, the third party shall not deliver it to the person subjected to execution.
 The people's court may seal up, distrain or freeze the property of the person subjected to execution possessed by a third party according to law for its own interests, and the third party may continue to possess and use the property, but shall not deliver it to the person subjected to execution.
 (2020) Supreme Famin Shen No.6700  n (2020) Supreme Famin Shen No.5648  n (2021) No. 888 of the Civil Division of Yu 05  n (2022) No. 3288 of the Civil Division of Xiang 0725  n (2023) No. 2731 of the Civil Division of Yu 0231  n (2024) No. 959 of the Civil Division of Yun 01  n (2025) No. 9 of the New 40
